views.issues_with_fines:
SELECT sl_no,
    book_id,
    user_id,
    issue_date,
    due_date,
    return_date,
    status,
    payment_requested_date,
    payment_status,
    renewal_count,
    COALESCE((
        CASE
            WHEN (payment_status = 'approved'::text) THEN payment_requested_date
            ELSE NULL::timestamp without time zone
        END)::timestamp with time zone, (return_date)::timestamp with time zone, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS effective_date,
    GREATEST((0)::numeric, floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (COALESCE((
        CASE
            WHEN (payment_status = 'approved'::text) THEN payment_requested_date
            ELSE NULL::timestamp without time zone
        END)::timestamp with time zone, (return_date)::timestamp with time zone, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - (due_date)::timestamp with time zone)) / (86400)::numeric))) AS days_overdue,
    (GREATEST((0)::numeric, floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (COALESCE((
        CASE
            WHEN (payment_status = 'approved'::text) THEN payment_requested_date
            ELSE NULL::timestamp without time zone
        END)::timestamp with time zone, (return_date)::timestamp with time zone, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - (due_date)::timestamp with time zone)) / (86400)::numeric))) * (3)::numeric) AS fine_amount
   FROM issues i;
